What visible component matches this description: the central mythological male figure?
questions.rgb_answer: The central mythological male figure is the one in the middle of the group of statues, who appears to be the focal point of the scene. He is standing upright and is holding what seems to be a spear or staff. This figure is part of the larger group of statues that are situated on the façade of the building, which is part of the Trevi Fountain in Rome, Italy.
